prompt: Create an ultra-realistic high-fashion editorial street portrait of a stylish young woman standing outdoors in front of a softly blurred modern building facade. She has long, thick dark brown hair styled into one prominent French side braid draped over her right shoulder, with a few loose face-framing strands. Her face is intentionally obscured by a plain square blur block centered over the face, while one black designer sunglass lens is partially visible at the left edge of the blur. She wears a premium oversized beige T-shirt tucked into tailored high-waisted beige trousers, creating a clean monochrome neutral outfit. Add exactly two visible accessories: a minimalist thick gold chain necklace around her neck and a luxury silver wristwatch on the wrist of the hand touching her braid. Pose her with one arm relaxed down and the other hand raised to lightly hold the side braid near her shoulder. Use soft natural daylight, shallow depth of field, DSLR realism, cinematic editorial color grading, 8K detail, creamy bokeh background, sharp fabric texture, realistic skin and hair, vertical fashion-crop composition, no text, no watermark.
